stories.title: FIA Regulation Meeting Set for April 9 — Teams Submit Proposals Before Miami

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA has confirmed a technical working group meeting for April 9.

Teams will submit proposals to fix F1's 2026 energy harvesting crisis before Miami.

Carlos Sainz (GPDA): "These accidents are going to happen a lot with this set of regulations."

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
F1 2026 regulation fixes on the table for April 9 meetings:

• Qualifying energy management removal
• Race harvest threshold adjustments
• Super-clipping zone restrictions

If the FIA gets this right, Miami could be a completely different sport.

#F1Fanrecap #F12026 #F1

article.headline: FIA Sets April 9 Meeting to Fix F1's 2026 Regulation Crisis Before Miami GP

stories.title: Verstappen Gets New Floor for Miami — But Older Honda PU Could Limit Gains

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's new floor for Verstappen at Miami reduces understeer, per Helmut Marko.

Catch: Red Bull runs an OLDER Honda PU while Mercedes installs a fresh one.

One step forward, one step back.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's update plan for Verstappen:

1. Jeddah — bodywork tweaks
2. Miami — new floor
3. Imola — further updates

From 9th to title contender in three steps? Mekies says he'll be "much happier" soon.

#F1Fanrecap #RedBull #F1

article.headline: Verstappen Gets New Floor for Miami — But Red Bull's Older Honda PU Complicates the Picture

stories.title: McLaren's Major Miami Upgrade — Aerodynamic Package Could Reset Season

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
McLaren has a BIG aerodynamic upgrade coming for Miami.

Andrea Stella: "We know it's not just power issues. We know we can do better aerodynamically."

Norris is 47 points back. If the MCL40 gets fixed — this championship gets interesting FAST.

#F1Fanrecap #McLaren #F1

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Reigning world champion Lando Norris: 5th in the 2026 standings, 47 points behind Antonelli after 3 races.

McLaren says a major update is coming for Miami.

The comeback story of 2026 could start May 1.

#F1Fanrecap #Norris #McLaren

article.headline: McLaren's Miami Upgrade Could Reset the 2026 Season — And Norris' Title Defense

stories.title: Antonelli Leads Championship at 19 — "Still Early Days"

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli. 19 years old. The youngest F1 championship leader in history.

And he gets FIVE WEEKS to sit with that fact before the Miami GP on May 1.

His take? "Still early days to think about the championship."

Composed beyond his years.

#F1Fanrecap #Antonelli #F1

article.headline: Antonelli Spends Five Weeks as F1's Youngest-Ever Championship Leader at 19

stories.title: Verstappen's Retirement Hints — Red Bull and F1 Respond

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's retirement hints aren't about Red Bull's car.

They're about F1's regulations.

"I just hope there is some action — it's not just me saying it."

If the FIA's April 9 meeting doesn't produce change, the sport may lose its best driver.

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #F1

article.headline: Verstappen's Retirement Hints Are About F1 Itself — Not Just Red Bull's Car

stories.title: Drivers Unite Against 2026 Rules — What Changes Are on the Table

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Why Bearman's 50G crash matters:

Colapinto: harvesting mode (slowing 45 km/h)
Bearman: deployment mode (full power)

Result: 190mph crash, zero warning.

This is the regulation crisis the FIA must fix before Miami.

#F1Fanrecap #F12026 #F1Safety

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
2026 Regulation Problem

#### Image Concept 6A — Social (1080x1350)

- **Composition:** Colapinto in car, racing action
- **Text overlay:** "HARVESTING VS DEPLOYMENT" (Bebas Neue, Racing Red) / "The Safety Gap That Must Be Fixed" (Montserrat, White)
- **Background:** Dark overlay, technical tone

stories.title: Miami GP Preview — 5 Things to Watch at Round 4

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Miami GP — 30 days away. What to watch:

- Verstappen new floor vs. older Honda PU
- McLaren aerodynamic update
- FIA regulation changes (if approved)
- Antonelli vs. Russell vs. Leclerc

May 1-3. Sprint weekend. Buckle up.

#F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP #F1
